name: Sandwich Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ground green tomatoes, sweet red peppers, green peppers, and sweet pickles. Allow to stand for 1 hour.
2. Drain off all juice from the mixture.
3. Add 1/2 cup of fresh water to the mixture.
4. Cook the tomatoes and peppers for about 20 minutes until the liquid has evaporated.
5. Add the pickles, sugar, flour, mustard, vinegar, sour cream, and beaten eggs to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil and cook until it thickens slightly.
7. Allow the spread to cool before sealing tightly in an airtight container.
8. Refrigerate the sandwich spread until ready to use.
